headline: AI for Game Theory: Computational Game Playing, Nash Equilibrium, and Multi-Agent Strategy
description: AI has mastered games through different strategic paradigms: perfect information (chess, Go -- AlphaZero, 2017-2018), imperfect information (poker -- Libratus/Pluribus, 2017-2019), and the hardest frontier -- games combining imperfect information, multi-agent negotiation, and natural language communication (DeepNash for Stratego, Cicero for Diplomacy). Each milestone has advanced computational game theory and multi-agent strategy.

citation.name: Mastering the game of Stratego with model-free multiagent reinforcement learning (DeepNash)
Human-level play in the game of Diplomacy by combining language models with strategic reasoning (Cicero)
